description: DMI ManageEngine Support Center - Solutions Database Context. This context provides information about the PostgreSQL 'solution' table structure and usage guidelines for querying DMI support solutions.

table_schema.solutionid: bigint - Primary key, unique identifier for each solution
table_schema.title: citext - Case-insensitive title of the solution
table_schema.description: citext - HTML-formatted detailed description of the solution
table_schema.attachments: boolean - Whether solution has file attachments
table_schema.helpdeskid: bigint - Foreign key to helpdesk/service desk

query_patterns.search_by_keyword: SELECT * FROM solution WHERE title ILIKE '%keyword%' OR description ILIKE '%keyword%' LIMIT 10;
query_patterns.search_by_type: SELECT * FROM solution WHERE solutiontype = 'Solution' LIMIT 10;
query_patterns.search_published: SELECT * FROM solution WHERE statusid = 2 LIMIT 10;
query_patterns.search_with_attachments: SELECT * FROM solution WHERE attachments = true LIMIT 10;

best_practices: Always use ILIKE for case-insensitive text searches on citext fields
Use LIMIT to prevent overwhelming result sets
Search in both title and description fields for better coverage
Description field contains HTML markup - may need parsing for clean text
Consider filtering by statusid=2 for published/active solutions only

preferences.business_purpose: Store and manage IT support solutions, knowledge base articles, and troubleshooting guides for DMI clients
